package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gin_handler_calls_multiple_repositories_directly: Handlers that coordinate several repositories directly, which usually signals missing service orchestration.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule042NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule042NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule042NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario042Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule042NegativeService, input Rule042NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
